idea-plugin.name: Docker URLs
idea-plugin.description:
Docker URLs adds a dedicated tool window for inspecting Docker Compose services in the current PyCharm project.

It helps you quickly identify which local endpoints are available without switching to the terminal.

  • Discovers Docker Compose projects inside the current workspace
  • Remembers the selected Compose project per PyCharm project
  • Shows service name, container status, and published localhost URLs
  • Refreshes service state automatically every 5 seconds with manual reload support
  • Sorts services by runtime status and pushes services without published URLs to the bottom
